---
title: High Power Rocketry
---


[Link to the current Engineering catalog descriptions](https://www.hmc.edu/engineering/curriculum/courses/engineering-course-descriptions/)

High Power Rocketry is a technical elective where students model, design, build, and fly high power rockets. They then compare the flight data with the modeled data.

## When Taught
<style>
th, td {
    padding:  0px 10px;
}
tbody tr:nth-of-type(even) {
      background-color: #f3f3f3;
}
</style>

| Course | Sem | Year | Style | Website | Info | Final Exam or Project |
| ------ | --- | ---- | ----- | ------- | ---- | --------------------- |
| E178 | Spring | 2024 | Lecture, Lab, Field Experiences | [Link](https://pages.hmc.edu/spjut/AdvRoc/index.md.html) | N/A | N/A |
| E178 | Spring | 2023 | Lecture, Lab, Field Experiences | [Link](https://pages.hmc.edu/spjut/AdvRoc/index.md.html) | N/A | N/A |
| E178 | Spring | 2022 | Lecture, Lab, Field Experiences | [Link](https://pages.hmc.edu/spjut/AdvRoc/index.md.html) | N/A | N/A |
| E178 | Spring | 2021 | Remote Lecture, Remote Lab, Solo Launches | [Link](https://pages.hmc.edu/spjut/AdvRoc/index.md.html) | N/A | N/A |
| E178 | Spring | 2020 | Lecture, Lab, Field Experiences | [Link](https://pages.hmc.edu/spjut/AdvRoc/index.md.html) | N/A | N/A |
| E190AJ | Spring | 2019 | Lecture, Lab, Field Experiences | [Link](https://pages.hmc.edu/spjut/AdvRoc/index.md.html) | N/A | N/A |
| E190AJ | Spring | 2018 | Lecture, Lab, Field Experiences | [Link](https://pages.hmc.edu/spjut/AdvRoc/index.md.html) | N/A | N/A |
